setup.blurb: Connect to PlayStation Network for trophy tracking, game library, friends, and messaging. Uses unofficial PSN API.
setup.help_text: Log in at store.playstation.com, then visit ca.account.sony.com/api/v1/ssocookie to obtain your NPSSO token. Use a dedicated PSN account — excessive API use may trigger account restrictions.

fields.label: NPSSO Token
fields.help: Session cookie from ca.account.sony.com — see prerequisites for extraction steps

fields.label: Enable Write Operations
fields.help: Send messages, accept/remove friends. Disabled by default.

prerequisites: A PlayStation Network account (dedicated API account recommended)
Log in at store.playstation.com in a browser
Visit ca.account.sony.com/api/v1/ssocookie to obtain your NPSSO token

highlights.text: Trophies — earned, summary, groups, compare with friends
Game library — owned titles, recent play, entitlements
Friends — list, online status, presence, search users
Discovery — search games and players across PSN

readme:
### What it does

PlayStation Network gives your AI agent access to PSN player data — trophies, game library, friends list, online presence, and messaging. Built on the unofficial PSNAWP library, it covers the same data the PlayStation app shows you, minus the UI.

Your agent can check trophy progress, compare achievements with friends, browse your game library, see who’s online, and search for players or games across PSN.

### Authentication

PSN uses an NPSSO session token rather than a standard API key. You extract it from your browser after logging into your Sony account. The token is short-lived — the library handles refresh automatically, but you may need to re-extract after extended inactivity.

A dedicated PSN account is recommended. Excessive API use on your primary account may trigger Sony’s rate limiting or account restrictions.

### Safety model

Read operations work immediately — trophies, games, friends, presence, search.

Write operations (messaging, friend accept/remove) require `PSN_WRITE_ENABLED=true`. This is disabled by default, so your agent can explore freely without accidentally sending messages or modifying your friends list.

### Tool coverage

| Category | Tools | What you can do |
|----------|-------|-----------------|
| Profile | 1 | View player profile and avatar |
| Trophies | 4 | Earned trophies, summaries, groups, compare |
| Games | 5 | Library, recent play, details, search, entitlements |
| Social | 5 | Friends, presence, search, messaging, friend management |
| Devices | 1 | Registered console information |

certification.security_notes: Uses unofficial PSN API (psnawp). NPSSO token auth. Write gates on messaging and friend management.

scenarios.label: Review trophy progress across recent games
scenarios.body: List recently played games, check trophy summary for each, then compare completion rates with a friend to see where you're ahead or behind.

scenarios.label: Check who's online and what they're playing
scenarios.body: Fetch your friends list with online presence, see which games friends are currently in, and optionally send a message to coordinate a session.

scenarios.label: Explore your game library and entitlements
scenarios.body: List all owned games with play time stats, search for a specific title's details, and check your digital entitlements to verify purchases.
